message:
feat(vc_cli): add DuckDB-to-FrankenSQLite migration command with e2e tests

- Add `migrate-db --from <duckdb> --to <sqlite>` subcommand
- Introspect DuckDB schema (columns, types, PKs, FKs) and auto-generate
  equivalent FrankenSQLite DDL with type mapping
- Copy rows in batches with progress reporting
- Post-migration verification: row counts, NULL counts, sample row checks,
  and foreign-key integrity via PRAGMA foreign_key_check
- Add duckdb, fsqlite, chrono, tempfile dependencies to vc_cli and root
- Add comprehensive e2e test (migration_integrity.rs) that creates a
  representative 3-table DuckDB fixture (machines, agent_sessions,
  system_metrics) with 2050 rows, migrates, and verifies checksum-level
  integrity including NULLs, structs, arrays, and Unicode values

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -130,6 +130,10 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 name = "tui_rendering"

+path = "tests/e2e/migration_integrity.rs"
+
 [dependencies]
